summary: Tested all Section B-G UAT requirements (B.1-B.19, C, D, E, F, G). All 26 backend pytest tests pass (100%). All core frontend requirements verified via Playwright and code review. One pre-existing legacy bug found in PlatformDashboard /platform stat cards showing 0.

minor.issue: Line 86: `totalMembers: data.donors?.total || 0` — should be `data.members?.total`. This causes TOTAL MEMBERS to always show 0 in /platform (legacy dashboard). GodMode /godmode is unaffected and shows correct data.

Latent bug: `campuses = [TENANT_ID]` - `TENANT_ID` is undefined (should be `DEFAULT_TENANT_ID`). Only triggered when no active tenants exist, so not triggered with current 7-church seed. Never hit in practice but should be fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: All stat cards show 0 (Churches: 0, Total Members: 0, Platform GMV: $0, MRR: $0, ARR: $0). Root cause: (1) data.donors?.total bug in setStats, (2) fetchPlatformStats intermittent TypeError fetch failure. The GodMode exec dashboard (/godmode) is correct and shows all real data.

issues: D check for 'Media & Worship' category passed visually (visible as 'MEDIA & WORSHIP' via CSS text-transform). The HTML uses '&' entity so plain text grep returns false-negative. Actual category IS rendered correctly.

action_items: Fix PlatformDashboard.jsx line 86: change `data.donors?.total` to `data.members?.total` so TOTAL MEMBERS shows correctly in /platform view
Fix platform.py line 53: change `TENANT_ID` to `DEFAULT_TENANT_ID` to remove latent NameError
Investigate intermittent TypeError: Failed to fetch for fetchPlatformStats in PlatformDashboard (may be timing issue with auth token setup)
critical_code_review_comments: PlatformDashboard.jsx line 86: `data.donors?.total` is wrong — backend returns `data.members.total`, not `data.donors.total`. This silently evaluates to undefined||0=0.

platform.py line 53: `TENANT_ID` is not defined in scope; only `DEFAULT_TENANT_ID` is imported. This is a latent NameError that would crash the /api/platform/stats endpoint if all tenants were inactive.

PlatformDashboard stat cards show MTD GMV ($0) while the actual GMV is $69M (all_time). The label says 'Month to date' which is correct — the MTD value may legitimately be $0 if no transactions were processed this month. This is not a bug.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core B-G requirements pass; PlatformDashboard legacy stat cards show 0)

seed_data_creation: Seed already run by E1. Platform has 7 churches: Abundant Church, Abundant East, Abundant Northeast, Abundant West, The Potter's House, EdenX, City Reach. Total members: 60,226. GMV all_time: $68,986,325.07. MRR: $20,299.88. ARR: $243,598.53.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Section B-G requirements verified. Key passing items: B.1 payouts normalization works, B.2/B.3 mtd_goal > 0, B.4/B.5 dynamic tenant names work, B.7 GodMode shows 7 churches, B.8 Solomon AI logo for platform_admin, B.9 no Pushpay/SecureGive, B.11 watch page light bg, B.12 code correct for empty giving state, B.14 Previous Dashboard button, B.15 tooltips, B.16 no duplicate link, B.17 replaces spreadsheets, B.18 view details links, B.19 6 nav items, C/D integrations clean, E campuses endpoint, F 7 churches + 60k members + $69M GMV, G 4 hero KPIs. Only pre-existing bug: PlatformDashboard /platform legacy view stat cards all show 0 due to data.donors?.total bug.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: Line 86 in PlatformDashboard.jsx: `totalMembers: data.donors?.total || 0` — the backend API returns `data.members.total` (not `data.donors.total`). Additionally, fetchPlatformStats intermittently fails with TypeError when mounted, leaving all stats at their initial 0 state.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Navigate to /platform as platform_admin. All stat cards show 0 (Churches, Members, GMV, MRR, ARR) despite 7 churches and $69M GMV in the database.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Change `data.donors?.total` to `data.members?.total` in PlatformDashboard.jsx line 86. The fetch failure may resolve itself or needs investigation of auth token timing.
